title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India
jsonLd.description:
Join the TNT India family as a Fleet Manager in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
